ws.meta.title: Wallet Sweep
ws.meta.description: Drain native coin and ERC20 tokens out of many EOAs into one wallet using EIP-7702. Upgrade once, then sweep 100+ wallets with a single passkey tap.
ws.title: Wallet Sweep
ws.subtitle: Vacuum native + ERC20 from many wallets into one — secured by your passkey, powered by EIP-7702.
ws.connect.required: Connect your biubiu.tools passkey to continue. Only your passkey can authorize a sweep.
ws.security.title: Your keys stay in this browser
ws.security.body: Pasted private keys never leave your device and are never stored — they only sign the on-chain upgrade locally. After upgrade, each wallet obeys only your passkey Safe; not even the relayer can move funds.
ws.network.title: Choose a network
ws.network.subtitle: Only chains that support EIP-7702 and your passkey wallet (RIP-7212 + Safe stack).
ws.keys.title: Private keys
ws.keys.subtitle: Paste one private key per line. We derive each address locally.
ws.tokens.title: Tokens to sweep
ws.tokens.subtitle: Native coin is always swept. Add any ERC20 contracts to include them.
ws.dest.title: Destination
ws.dest.subtitle: Where all swept assets are sent.
ws.preview.title: Preview
ws.fund.title: Fund the relayer
ws.fund.subtitle: A throwaway, zero-privilege wallet that only broadcasts the upgrade. It controls nothing.
ws.fund.manualHint: Or send the amount above to the relayer address from any wallet, then refresh.
ws.fund.deployNote: Includes a one-time deploy of your personal Sweeper contract on this chain.
ws.upgrade.title: Upgrading wallets
ws.upgrade.subtitle: Each wallet is delegated to your Sweeper via EIP-7702. The relayer pays gas.
ws.sweep.title: Sweep
ws.sweep.subtitle: Your passkey pulls native + ERC20 from every upgraded wallet to the destination.
ws.sweep.fingerprint: Each batch is one passkey tap.
ws.run.title: Review & run
ws.run.subtitle: Confirm what will be swept, fund the one-time relayer if needed, then run it all in one go.
ws.fee.label: Fee
ws.fee.note: Charged once per sweep, paid from your Safe in the first batch.
ws.done.title: Sweep complete
ws.done.subtitle: Assets moved to your destination. Wallets stay upgraded for one-tap future sweeps.
ws.revoke.title: Revoke delegations
ws.revoke.subtitle: Reset upgraded wallets back to plain EOAs. Needs the private keys present.
ws.history.title: History
ws.logs.title: Activity
